---
title: "Notes on the R Package sdm"
description: "A note introducing the overview and basic use of the sdm package."
date: "2026-01-26"
date-modified: "2026-01-26"
draft: true
lang: en
categories: [r]
---

::: {.callout-note}
Original Japanese version: [Rのsdmパッケージについて](../../../posts/2026-01-26-sdm-package/index.qmd)
:::

## Installation

```{.r}
install.packages('sdm')
```

If you want to install the latest development version from GitHub, use the following command.

```{.r}
devtools::install_github("babaknaimi/sdm")
```

To run SDMs, modeling packages are required.
Use the `installAll()` function to install these packages together.

```{.r}
installAll()
```

## Useful Links

Official documentation.
The update date is 2016, which seems close to the initial release, so the information may be old.

- [getting started with sdm package](https://sdm.r-forge.r-project.org/)

An unofficial tutorial article for the sdm package.

- [Rpubs - SDM](https://rpubs.com/Wyclife/sdm_ensemble)

GitHub repository.

- [GitHub - babaknaimi sdm](https://github.com/babaknaimi/sdm?tab=readme-ov-file)

Paper.

- Naimi, B., Araujo, M.B. (2016) sdm: a reproducible and extensible R platform for species distribution modelling, Ecography, 39:368-375, DOI: [10.1111/ecog.01881](https://doi.org/10.1111/ecog.01881)

Package documentation.

- [Help for package sdm](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/sdm/refman/sdm.html#background)

The CRAN page for the package.

- [CRAN - Package sdm](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/sdm/index.html)
